default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Surge AI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects, strategies, and align on priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus areas need clarification; GrowthX seeking projects where they can drive more of the process](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Content strategy and amplification work streams require further exploration and definition](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Events planning (e.g., AI Engineer Summit, private dinners) needs better coordination and proactive management](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Opportunities identified for improving day-to-day annotation worker growth and organic traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

## Topics

### Project Focus and Priorities

  - [GrowthX seeking areas where they can drive more of the process](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Data annotation with Akash's team: 99% ads, potential for organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Proof of concept for driving coder signups in progress](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Events planning relatively stable, but prioritization unclear in some areas](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Website and social media efforts paused as Surge AI has taken them in-house](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Content creation needs more input and direction from Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Leaderboard concept discussed as potential showcase of Surge AI's view on good AGI](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Need for simpler initial design due to limited metrics at launch](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Events Planning

  - [Separate events sync to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Seattle happy hour and New York private dinner in progress](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [NRIPS conference: Investigating sponsorship opportunities and quality of attendees](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [AI Engineer Summit: Lessons learned on better preparation and understanding conference expectations](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

### Amplification and PR

  - [GrowthX to coordinate with Surge AI's PR agency on outbound efforts (podcasts, newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Clarification needed on PR agency's priorities and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/sToRCP7WN8zyzUi3Mv9spDhuirHtCq5c?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
